jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Grofers
jsonLd.description:
Grofers invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Grofers:
Grofers is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers!
